title: calanthe pauciflora subsp. sabahensis
intro: Calanthe pauciflora subsp. sabahensis is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Sabah, Malaysia. This orchid is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calanthe pauciflora subsp. sabahensis are believed to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as providing antioxidant and cardiovascular protective effects. However, due to its rarity and lack of extensive research, the exact herbal preparations and dosages for its medicinal use are not well established.
